title: Craft That Saddle
description: Simple mod that adds a crafting recipe to the Minecraft saddle
body:
This is a simple Minecraft mod that just adds a single thing a recipe to the Minecraft Saddle
![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/ICkKWui.png)
